steps.title: Close the date clause
steps.content: The sentence first explains that Page's flying ship was patented on April 10, 1906, roughly six weeks before the Wright brothers' patent. The next words, Page's only model had been suspiciously destroyed, begin a new independent clause and need a full sentence boundary.

steps.title: Avoid comma splices
steps.content: Choice A uses dashes around the comparison but leaves the next independent clause attached. Choice B uses commas where a sentence break is needed. Choice C omits the year and also leaves a comma splice. A period before Page's correctly starts the next sentence. The answer is D.
